V3.23.51 вЂ” 30.03.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
WaCRM 3.3.0 (Official Version) - Quick Replies Module Updates:
вЂў New Folder System to group, name, and color buttons with a restore feature.
вЂў Multi-Select Support: Hold Ctrl to select multiple buttons for bulk moving or reordering.
вЂў UI Enhancements: Rounded button corners and a fluid hover-active settings menu.
вЂў Character Limit: Descriptions expanded from 15 to 50 characters.
вЂў Media Support: Added support for .jpeg image format in Quick Replies, resolving previous compatibility issues.
вЂў Help Center: Added (?) icon and version display inside the Quick Replies settings.
(Note: This update is intended for official versions only.)

V3.23.4 вЂ” 21.03.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў WaSender 3.7.0 (Official Version): Fixed an issue in the Auto Reply module where Poll messages were not being sent. Polls are now delivered correctly and reliably during automated responses.
(Note: This update is intended for the official version only. Modified or unofficial versions may experience issues.)

V3.23.3 вЂ” 21.03.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў WaSender 3.7.0 (Official Version): Fixed a critical issue in the Number Warmer module where the system was only switching between accounts without sending messages. The warmer is now fully stable and correctly exchanges messages between accounts.
вЂў WaCRM 3.3.0 (Official Version): Fixed a minor issue in the Auto Reply module where an extra blank space was being added below each message. Messages are now sent cleanly without any unwanted spacing.
(Note: This update is intended for the official versions WaSender 3.7.0 and WaCRM 3.3.0. Users running modified or unofficial versions may experience issues.)

V3.22.3 вЂ” 03.03.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў Improved the number extraction mechanism from groups, chats, and Labels, resolving cases where incorrect or unusual IDs were returned. The system now accurately retrieves real phone numbers.

V3.22.2 вЂ” 28.02.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў WaCRM 3.3.0 (Official Versions): Fixed a critical issue in the Auto Reply module that was preventing the Welcome Message from being sent correctly.
вЂў Resolved a bug where the Welcome Message was being triggered repeatedly or sent alongside Keyword-based replies, ensuring a smoother and more accurate automated response flow.
вЂў Enhanced the chat history verification logic to accurately distinguish between new and existing conversations, preventing redundant automated greetings.
вЂў Fixed Group Invite Link validation: Resolved an issue where full URLs or links containing extra parameters
(Note: This update is intended for the official versions WaSender 3.7.0 and WaCRM 3.3.0. Users running modified or unofficial versions may experience issues.)

V3.22.0 вЂ” 27.02.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў This release includes important bug fixes to address issues introduced after recent platform changes

V3.20.26 вЂ” 27.02.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў Fixed an issue affecting message retrieval (getMessages) due to internal structural changes.
вЂў Resolved an invalid ID (WID) value error when handling certain objects or opening chats.
вЂў Fixed a sending issue when delivering messages to specific LID-based identifiers, improving overall message stability.
(Note: This update is intended for the official versions WaSender 3.7.0 and WaCRM 3.3.0. Users running modified or unofficial versions may experience issues.)

V3.20.25 вЂ” 26.02.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў WaSender 3.7.0 & WaCRM 3.3.0 (Official Versions): Fixed an issue affecting some users where group member extraction was not working properly or returning incomplete results in certain cases.
вЂў Fixed a messaging issue where some recipients were being skipped when sending standard messages, Quick Replies, or Auto Reply messages, ensuring that all selected contacts now receive messages without exception.
вЂў Improved the number extraction mechanism from groups, chats, and Labels, resolving cases where incorrect or unusual IDs were returned. The system now accurately retrieves real phone numbers.
вЂў Enhanced overall sending stability and ensured accurate targeting of the correct phone number for each message, with improved reliability during campaigns and bulk sending.
вЂў (Note: This update is intended for the official versions WaSender 3.7.0 and WaCRM 3.3.0. Users running modified or unofficial versions may experience issues.)

V3.20.24 вЂ” 20.02.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў WaSender & WaCRM: Fixed an issue where media attachments (Images, Videos, and Audio) were failing to send in standard messages, Quick Replies, and Auto Reply mode.

V3.20.23 вЂ” 15.02.2026
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў Official WaSender 3.7.0 Update: Fixed and restored the Social Media Data Extraction feature from search engines and social platforms, resolving the previous failure and ensuring complete data retrieval.

V3.20.22 вЂ” 14.02.2026

вЂў Official WaSender 3.7.0 Update: Fixed the ChromeDriver auto-update issue to ensure the correct official version is downloaded properly.
вЂў Fixed Google Maps data extraction when using the Old Classic UI (legacy browser mode), resolving rating and data duplication issues.
(Users running unofficial or modified versions may experience issues; this update is intended only for the official latest version 3.7.0.)

V3.20.21 вЂ” 14.02.2026

вЂў WaSender: Fixed an issue affecting some users where group member number extraction was inconsistent or partially failing, and also resolved a related issue with extracting active group members.

вЂў WaSender: Fixed an issue with extracting data from Google Maps.
вЂў GMExtractor: Added update support for future releases and fixed data extraction issues from Google Maps.
вЂў Fixed an issue where messages sent by Auto Reply were not marked as read in WaCRM and WaSender.
